mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user_relation_operation_logs WHERE relation_id = #{relationId} AND del_flag = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_relation_operation_logs ( id, relation_id, user_id, target_user_id, action_type, before_state, after_state, reason, operator_id, channel, request_id, ip, user_agent, device_info, success, remark, del_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{relationId}, #{userId}, #{targetUserId}, #{actionType}, #{beforeState}, #{afterState}, #{reason}, #{operatorId}, #{channel}, #{requestId}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, #{deviceInfo}, #{success}, #{remark}, #{delFlag}, NOW(), #{createBy}, NOW(), #{updateBy} )
